papers.title: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens
papers.breakthrough: We introduce Voxtral TTS, an expressive multilingual text-to-speech model that generates natural speech from as little as 3 seconds of reference audio. Voxtral TTS adopts a hybrid architecture that combines auto-regressive generation of semantic speech tokens with flow-matching for acoustic tokens.
papers.authors: Alexander H. Liu, Alexis Tacnet, Andy Ehrenberg et al.

papers.title: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention for Efficient End-to-End Memory Model Scaling to 100M Tokens (Yu Chen et al.)
papers.breakthrough: Long-term memory is a cornerstone of human intelligence. Enabling AI to process lifetime-scale information remains a long-standing pursuit in the field. Due to the constraints of full-attention architectures, the effective context length of large language models (LLMs) is typically limited to 1M tok
papers.authors: Yu Chen, Runkai Chen, Sheng Yi et al.

papers.title: SlopCodeBench: Benchmarking How Coding Agents Degrade Over Long-Horizon Iterative Tasks
Gen-Searcher: Reinforcing Agentic Search for Image Generation
papers.breakthrough: Recent image generation models have shown strong capabilities in generating high-fidelity and photorealistic images. papers.authors: Kaituo Feng, Manyuan Zhang, Shuang Chen et al.

papers.title: Emergent Social Intelligence Risks in Generative Multi-Agent Systems
papers.breakthrough: Multi-agent systems composed of large generative models are rapidly moving from laboratory prototypes to real-world deployments, where they jointly plan, negotiate, and allocate shared resources to solve complex tasks. papers.authors: Yue Huang, Yu Jiang, Wenjie Wang et al.

papers.title: Out of Sight but Not Out of Mind: Hybrid Memory for Dynamic Video World Models
papers.breakthrough: Video world models have shown immense potential in simulating the physical world, yet existing memory mechanisms primarily treat environments as static canvases. When dynamic subjects hide out of sight and later re-emerge, current methods often struggle, leading to frozen, distorted, or vanishing su
papers.authors: Kaijin Chen, Dingkang Liang, Xin Zhou et al.

papers.title: ShotStream: Streaming Multi-Shot Video Generation for Interactive Storytelling
papers.breakthrough: Multi-shot video generation is crucial for long narrative storytelling, yet current bidirectional architectures suffer from limited interactivity and high latency. We propose ShotStream, a novel causal multi-shot architecture that enables interactive storytelling and efficient on-the-fly frame gener
papers.authors: Yawen Luo, Xiaoyu Shi, Junhao Zhuang et al.

papers.title: PackForcing: Short Video Training Suffices for Long Video Sampling and Long Context Inference
papers.breakthrough: Image restoration under real-world degradations is critical for downstream tasks such as autonomous driving and object detection. papers.breakthrough: Equipping Large Language Model (LLM) agents with domain-specific skills is critical for tackling complex tasks. Yet, manual authoring creates a severe scalability bottleneck. papers.authors: Jingwei Ni, Yihao Liu, Xinpeng Liu et al.

papers.title: MedOpenClaw: Auditable Medical Imaging Agents Reasoning over Uncurated Full Studies
papers.breakthrough: Currently, evaluating vision-language models (VLMs) in medical imaging tasks oversimplifies clinical reality by relying on pre-selected 2D images that demand significant manual labor to curate. This setup misses the core challenge of realworld diagnostics: a true clinical agent must actively navigat
papers.authors: Weixiang Shen, Yanzhu Hu, Che Liu et al.

papers.title: RealChart2Code: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Real Data and Multi-Task Evaluation
papers.breakthrough: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in code generation across various domains. papers.title: Composer 2 Technical Report
papers.breakthrough: Composer 2 is a specialized model designed for agentic software engineering.
